summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of Remake Pixel MVP. Backend: 27/27 pytest cases passed across public endpoints, auth (register/login/me), credits, real Replicate image generation (advanced mode, 10cr deducted, image returned), favorites/history/delete, Stripe checkout (live key returns checkout_url), webhook signature validation, and full admin endpoints (stats/users/credits-adjust/patch/transactions) with 403 for non-admin. Frontend: Landing renders cinematic dark/purple aesthetic with Cormorant Garamond serif headlines, lavender italic accent, marquee, 3 pricing cards, 10 FAQ items. /login and /register submit and redirect to /app/generate. Dashboard sidebar has all nav links and credits badge. Generate page in Advanced mode produced real Replicate image and credits decremented 30->20. Fast mode shows 33 styles. Billing redirects to live Stripe checkout (Starter €5.00). Admin page accessible by admin user; user table + actions + transactions visible.
action_items: Naming inconsistency vs review_request: actual testids are 'hero-title', 'hero-cta-primary', 'nav-login', 'nav-signup' (not 'landing-hero'/'cta-login'/'cta-register'). Functional but doc/spec mismatch—consider aligning either spec or testids.
Stripe merchant display name in checkout page reads 'NanonIA' (Stripe account name). Verify if this should be 'Remake Pixel' for brand consistency.
Frontend 'landing networkidle' never resolves (likely due to background animation/marquee). Not a bug, but tests should use domcontentloaded.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~480 lines and handling auth, credits, generation, stripe, admin in a single module—consider splitting into routers/ for maintainability.
Generation flow correctly spends credits before calling Replicate and refunds on failure (good resilience pattern).
JWT_SECRET in .env is a development placeholder ('change-in-prod-2026')—must be rotated before production deployment.
ADMIN_EMAILS env-driven admin role assignment only happens at registration time; if env is changed later, existing users won't pick up role change. Consider promoting roles via admin tool.

/api/webhooks/stripe is mounted directly on app rather than the /api router with prefix—works but inconsistent with other endpoints (still correctly reachable via /api/webhooks/stripe because the path itself contains /api).
Frontend axios client uses bearer interceptor—verified working. Credits badge auto-updates after generation.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@remakepix.com / Admin@2026Remake. User: test@remakepix.com / Test@2026Remake (credits drained from 50 to 20 during test).
seed_data_creation: Created 2 TEST_ prefixed users during register tests, plus 1 TEST_zero user with 0 credits to verify 402. One real Replicate generation consumed 10 credits from test@remakepix.com.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All MVP core flows pass. Stripe LIVE keys—do NOT complete payments in test. Replicate calls are real; limit generations to 1-2 per session. Test user starts each session with whatever credits remain (currently 20 after this run). To replenish, login as admin and use Adjust button or POST /api/admin/credits/adjust. TEST_-prefixed users in DB can be safely deleted.
